name: anti-ai-voice-auditor
description: Detect and remove AI writing patterns from your content. Includes pattern auditor, LinkedIn hook generator, and a voice guide template.

interface.shortDescription: Catch AI writing patterns before your readers do.
interface.longDescription: Three skills in one plugin: (1) AI Writing Audit scans content for 16+ categories of AI tells — clichés, inflated phrases, weasel words, structural red flags. (2) LinkedIn Hook Writer generates 10 pattern-breaking hooks using 5 proven techniques. (3) Voice Guide template helps you define and enforce authentic writing voice across all content. Built from a production content pipeline that runs daily.
defaultPrompt: Run the AI writing audit on my latest draft.
Generate LinkedIn hooks for this content.
Help me define my writing voice using the voice guide template.
